creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
Created attachment 258624
diff between original patch and mine

(In reply to bruno from comment #18)

> Also it's hard to see what changed from your patch to mine within bugzilla since it can't diff both patches

> What essential fixes did you make besides adding walletd/renterd/hostd to the net-p2p/Makefile subdir list ?

> It seems to me all the other changes are just reordering some of the targets in the Makefiles, correct ?

I can send the diff between your patch and mine but it would be better to use my patch in my opinion because i used port tools to fix ordering, indentation, spaces etc. Also fixed minor things too, like removing -trimpath from GO_BUILDFLAGS because it's already included in default port GO_BUILDFLAGS etc.

> then you delete your patch so there is no confusion.

AFAIK deletion is not possible.
